description: Memory forgetting and decay benchmark. Tests temporal confidence decay, trust tier half-life differences, and governance quarantine/cleanup. Validates that the system correctly applies query-time decay and tier-based retention.

scenarios.title: Temporal decay: newer memory wins with same initial confidence
scenarios.description: Two memories with same initial_confidence and trust_tier, but different ages (10 days vs 100 days). Query-time half-life decay should rank the newer one higher, even though both have identical initial confidence.

seed_memories.content: API rate limit is 1000 requests per minute for all endpoints.
API rate limit increased to 2000 requests per minute after infrastructure upgrade.

steps.content: API rate limit is 1000 requests per minute for all endpoints.
API rate limit increased to 2000 requests per minute after infrastructure upgrade.

assertions.query: What is the current API rate limit?

scenarios.title: Trust tier half-life: T1 survives longer than T4
scenarios.description: T1 memory (6 months old, 365-day half-life) vs T4 memory (1 month old, 30-day half-life). Despite T4 being newer, T1's effective confidence should be higher due to dramatically longer half-life. Tests that trust tier correctly modulates decay rate.

seed_memories.content: Core platform architecture follows microservices pattern with event-driven communication.
Considering migration to monolith due to operational complexity concerns.

steps.content: Core platform architecture follows microservices pattern with event-driven communication.
Considering migration to monolith due to operational complexity concerns.

scenarios.title: Governance quarantine: low effective confidence memories excluded
scenarios.description: Old memory with very low effective confidence (due to age decay) should be quarantined by governance and excluded from retrieval. T3 half-life=60d, quarantine_threshold=0.3: a 200-day-old memory has effective_confidence≈0.036, well below threshold. Tests the governance loop that marks is_active=0 for stale memories.

seed_memories.content: Data retention policy 2024: Customer data retained for 30 days after account closure.
Data retention policy 2025: Customer data retained for 90 days after account closure per legal requirements.

steps.content: Data retention policy 2025: Customer data retained for 90 days after account closure per legal requirements.

assertions.query: What is our data retention policy for customer data?

scenarios.title: Activation decay: distant graph nodes receive lower scores
scenarios.description: In a multi-hop entity chain, nodes further from the anchor should have lower activation scores due to spreading decay. Tests that activation propagation correctly applies decay rate at each hop.

seed_memories.content: Alice is the tech lead for the payment team.
Payment team owns the billing-service microservice.
Billing-service uses Stripe API for payment processing.
Stripe API requires webhook endpoint configuration for async events.
Webhook endpoints must be HTTPS with valid SSL certificates.

assertions.query: What does Alice's team work on?

scenarios.title: Temporal recency boost in final scoring
scenarios.description: Even with similar activation and semantic scores, more recent memories should rank higher due to temporal recency factor in scoring. Tests the TEMPORAL_DECAY_HOURS component of retrieval scoring.

seed_memories.content: Incident #1234: Database connection pool exhausted at 14:00. Resolved by restarting connection pool.
Incident #1235: Database connection pool exhausted again at 16:00. Root cause identified as connection leak in auth service.

steps.content: Incident #1234: Database connection pool exhausted at 14:00. Resolved by restarting connection pool.
Incident #1235: Database connection pool exhausted again at 16:00. Root cause identified as connection leak in auth service.

assertions.query: What caused the database connection pool issue?
